title: QuickEat
description: Automatically eats the best food from your hotbar!
body:
![QuickEat Banner](https://github.com/LumaBlossom/QuickEat/blob/main/_assets/quickeatbanner.png?raw=true)

A lightweight and premium client-side Minecraft Fabric mod that automates eating with elegance and precision.

## ✨ Features

- **One-Key Eating**: Press its dedicated keybind (default **G**) to instantly find and consume the best food in your inventory.
- **Sorting**:
  - **Saturation Mode**: Prioritizes food that keeps you full longer (e.g., Golden Carrots).
  - **Hunger Mode**: Prioritizes food that restores the most hunger points (e.g., Steak).
- **Eat until full**: Automatically eats until your hunger bar is full.

## 🛠️ Configuration

QuickEat is fully configurable via **ModMenu** and **Cloth Config**:

- **General**: Toggle continuous eating, set your sorting preference, and hotbar swapping.
- **Logs**: A tab to customize exactly what messages appear in your action bar.

## 🌍 Localizations

- **English** (en_us)
- **Русский** (ru_ru)
- **Українська** (uk_ua)

## 📥 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/).
2. Drop the `quickeat.jar` into your `mods` folder.
3. **Required**: Install [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).
4. **Recommended**: Install [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to access the settings screen.
